title: Koala Joins the Sun Pirates
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Koala, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is koala joins the sun pirates.
scene: The scene follows koala joins the sun pirates, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Koala, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We finally found it...

dialogue.speaker: Koala
dialogue.text: An eternal pose to Koala's home.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: NYUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: 'Koolol (former slave)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: (Former slave)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: AHaha hah! You look so different.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Smile

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I - I don't think this is really...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't start complaining after we went of the trouble of buying it for you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we got you a nice haircut as well!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Trust me, your mother will be delighted.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I - I think I'll clean up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Smile

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let her work if she wants to.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: NYUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no use in rushing her. This kind of trauma doesn't vanish overnight, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This isn't MarieJoa, you know!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: "I see...

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: You tell him, Aladdin....!! I guess you former slaves understand each other pretty good, yeah?

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: ship's doctor of the sun pirates /7LoloicLci (brotula merman, former soldier in the neptune army)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: go on, admit it!! Really, you want to kill the brat here and now, don't ya?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's a human!! No different from those monsters that kept you imprisoned!!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Give it a rest, would you, arlong ....?!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: You should be more honest an' all, brat! What did your mother teach you, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your parents look down on us just like the rest of the humans, right?! Shaha Ahahahah!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the way of human society!! They fool themselves into believing that their own race is the greatest and most splendid in the world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And their children learn from their parents to think the same way...!! Unless somebody puts 'em in their place, that ain't ever gonna change!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, you've all seen it for your- selves in the three years we've been at sea....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those scornful looks the humans give us wherever we go!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it weren't for the boss's orders, I'd've sorted them out pretty fast!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Certainly, some humans look at us: with scorn.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But others... I see some- thing different in their eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It always seems to me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...as though they are afraid of us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it because we are pirates...? What is there to be so afraid of...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's because ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...they don't know anything about you ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We still know next to nothing about humanity as a whole!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Fear of... the UN- known ....?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will things change if we learn more about one another.....?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where is it now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WRONG! It's over here!

summary: Koala Joins the Sun Pirates. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
